name: convert_url_to_pdf
description: Convert a web page at a given URL to a PDF document using Gotenberg's Chromium engine. Gotenberg will navigate to the URL, render the page (including CSS and JavaScript), and produce a PDF. Supports the same page configuration options as HTML conversion (margins, paper size, landscape, etc.). Useful for capturing web pages, dashboards, or any publicly accessible URL as a PDF snapshot.

parameters.name: url
parameters.description: The URL of the web page to convert to PDF. Must be accessible from the Gotenberg instance (consider network/firewall restrictions for self-hosted setups).

parameters.name: paperWidth
parameters.description: Paper width in inches. Default is '8.5'.

parameters.name: paperHeight
parameters.description: Paper height in inches. Default is '11'.

parameters.name: marginTop
parameters.description: Top margin in inches. Default is '0.39'.

parameters.name: marginBottom
parameters.description: Bottom margin in inches. Default is '0.39'.

parameters.name: marginLeft
parameters.description: Left margin in inches. Default is '0.39'.

parameters.name: marginRight
parameters.description: Right margin in inches. Default is '0.39'.

parameters.name: landscape
parameters.description: Set to 'true' for landscape orientation. Default is 'false'.

parameters.name: scale
parameters.description: Scale of the page rendering. Default is '1.0'.

parameters.name: waitDelay
parameters.description: Duration to wait after page load before converting (e.g., '3s'). Useful for JavaScript-heavy pages.

parameters.name: extraHttpHeaders
parameters.description: JSON string of additional HTTP headers to send when loading the URL. Example: '{"Authorization": "Bearer token123"}'.
